name: Rhubarb Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 6 Cups Fresh Rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. FILLING: Combine sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon in a saucepan. Stir in rhubarb and water. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Stir in butter.
3. TOPPING: Stir together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Combine egg and milk; add all at once to flour mixture.
4. Put filling into a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish and immediately spoon topping over it, creating 8 mounds. Bake for about 20 minutes.
